basic_details.job_title: DRDO SAG Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 11 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Scientific Analysis Group (DRDO SAG) has published the Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 notification under Advt. No. SAG 007. The recruitment drive aims to fill 11 Junior Research Fellow positions. Candidates with qualifications including Post Graduate degree in Mathematics/Physics with NET qualification or B.E./B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech in CSE/IT/CS/EE/ECE with NET/GATE Score and meeting the age criteria of maximum 28 years are eligible to participate in the recruitment process. Interested candidates can attend the walk-in interview on 05 August 2026. Candidates can access the official no

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PH candidates as per Govt. of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Mathematics/Physics with NET qualified, B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech in CSE/IT/CS/EE/ECE with NET/GATE Score
qualification.details: Mathematics: Post Graduate degree in Mathematics in First division with NET qualified. Desirable: Knowledge of Cryptology & Computer Programming in C/C++. Computer Science Engineering (CSE)/ Information Technology (IT) / Computer Science (CS): B.E/ B.Tech degree in CSE/IT/CS with first division and valid NET/GATE Score or M.E/ M.Tech in the relevant field with First division both at Graduate and Post graduate level. Desirable: Knowledge of basic Cryptology, Computer Programming in C/C++, Java, Python. Electronics Engineering (EE)/ Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE): B.E/ B.Tech degree in EE/ECE with first division and valid NET/GATE Score or M.E/ M.Tech in the relevant field with First division both at Graduate and Post graduate level. Desirable: Knowledge of Embedded Systems and Cryptology. Physics: Post Graduate degree in Physics in First division with NET qualified. Desirable: Knowledge of Quantum Physics & Computer Programming in C/C++.

content_sections.heading: DRDO SAG Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DRDO SAG Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DRDO SAG Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_name: Computer Science Engineering (CSE)/ Information Technology (IT) / Computer Science (CS)

content_sections.heading: DRDO SAG Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Mathematics: Post Graduate degree in Mathematics in First division with NET qualified. Desirable: Knowledge of Cryptology & Computer Programming in C/C++. Computer Science Engineering (CSE)/ Information Technology (IT) / Computer Science (CS): B.E/ B.Tech degree in CSE/IT/CS with first division and valid NET/GATE Score or M.E/ M.Tech in the relevant field with First division both at Graduate and Post graduate level. Desirable: Knowledge of basic Cryptology, Computer Programming in C/C++, Java, Python. Electronics Engineering (EE)/ Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE): B.E/ B.Tech degree in EE/ECE with first division and valid NET/GATE Score or M.E/ M.Tech in the relevant field with First division both at Graduate and Post graduate level. Desirable: Knowledge of Embedded Systems and Cryptology. Physics: Post Graduate degree in Physics in First division with NET qualified. Desirable: Knowledge of Quantum Physics & Computer Programming in C/C++.

content_sections.heading: DRDO SAG Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PH candidates as per Govt. of India Rules.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for DRDO SAG Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO SAG Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. The interview is scheduled for 05 August 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow position across various disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by discipline and include Post Graduate degrees in Mathematics or Physics with NET, or B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech in CSE/IT/CS/EE/ECE with NET/GATE scores.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PH candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the DRDO SAG Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview. Interested and eligible candidates need to report at the specified venue on the interview date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the DRDO SAG Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the Walk-in Interview be held?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at the Scientific Analysis Group (DRDO SAG) located in Delhi, PIN code 110054.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).
